summary: Invoice-Offer (Рахунок-оферта) feature testing complete. Backend: 14/14 pytest tests PASSED. Invoice-offer 7403 returns HTML with bank details (IBAN UA043220010000026003340091618, MFO 322001). Invoice-offer 7392 shows additional service 'Мінімальне замовлення' (730 грн). Invoice-offer 7338 shows service_fee 'Таксі' (500 грн). Estimate documents also work correctly with additional services. Frontend code verified: LeftRailDocuments.jsx has 'invoice_offer' in DOCS_BY_STATUS for pending, awaiting_customer, draft, confirmed, processing statuses. ClientsTab.jsx shows document links (Кошторис, Рахунок-оферта) for each client order at line 1099.
